changeSet.author: healthdata-system

not.sqlCheck: SELECT data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'audit_events' AND column_name = 'request_payload';

changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE audit_events ALTER COLUMN request_payload TYPE jsonb USING NULLIF(request_payload, '')::jsonb;

changeSet.author: healthdata-system

not.sqlCheck: SELECT data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'audit_events' AND column_name = 'response_payload';

changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE audit_events ALTER COLUMN response_payload TYPE jsonb USING NULLIF(response_payload, '')::jsonb;
